note: v410: Real app icons. The manifest pointed at icon.png / icon-180.png, but those files never existed in the repo — the Worker's SPA fallback answered them with index.html, so Android saw no valid icon and 'Add to Home Screen' made a generic bookmark with no install prompt. Added actual PNG icons (192 + 512, maskable) so Samsung/Chrome offer a real full-screen install with the Bookkeeper logo.
